blocks.name: eval.weights
blocks.description: Main evaluation weights for the internal engine.
blocks.research_goal: Validate that broad evaluation weights can sustain non-zero static-eval calibration signals before acceptance matches.

blocks.name: eval.weights_no_mobility
blocks.description: Evaluation-weight subset excluding the already risky mobility-weight downshift.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether the broad eval-weight signal survives after freezing mobility at the promoted 0.85 value, because mobility 0.85 -> 0.7 previously caused p16 rank regression.

blocks.name: eval.material_weight
blocks.description: Single-parameter material evaluation weight calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether material weight alone produces a stable static-eval signal before reopening broad evaluation weights.

blocks.name: eval.mobility_weight
blocks.description: Single-parameter mobility evaluation weight calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether mobility weight alone produces a stable static-eval signal before reopening broad evaluation weights.

blocks.name: eval.king_safety_weight
blocks.description: Single-parameter king-safety evaluation weight calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether king-safety weight alone produces a stable static-eval signal after mobility weight is held.

blocks.name: eval.piece_activity_weight
blocks.description: Single-parameter piece-activity evaluation weight calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether piece-activity evaluation weight alone produces a stable static-eval signal after mobility and king-safety weights are held.

blocks.name: eval.pawn_structure_weight
blocks.description: Single-parameter pawn-structure evaluation weight calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether pawn-structure evaluation weight alone produces a stable static-eval signal after other eval weights are held.

blocks.name: piece_activity
blocks.description: Activity and centralization features for minor pieces and rooks.
blocks.research_goal: Measure whether piece-activity features produce stable static-eval signals on development and open-file structures.

blocks.name: piece_activity.center_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for center activity bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether reducing piece-activity center bonus is reproducible after broad piece_activity produced only negative gate-cross changes.

blocks.name: piece_activity.extended_center_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for extended-center activity bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether extended-center activity can improve feedback after center_bonus reached a p8 feedback boundary.

blocks.name: piece_activity.minor_rank_bonus_weight
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for minor-piece rank activity.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether rank-based minor-piece activity gives reproducible feedback after center activity parameters reached promoted boundaries.

blocks.name: piece_activity.minor_center_distance_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for minor-piece center-distance penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether minor-piece center-distance penalty gives reproducible feedback after rank activity failed feedback prescreen.

blocks.name: pawn_structure
blocks.description: Pawn advance and structural penalties.
blocks.research_goal: Measure whether pawn-structure penalties align static evaluation with oracle scores on isolated, doubled, and advanced pawn cases.

blocks.name: pawn_structure.advance_bonus_per_rank
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for pawn advance bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether pawn advance bonus gives reproducible feedback after minor-piece activity subfaces failed outer feedback.

blocks.name: pawn_structure.isolated_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for isolated-pawn penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether isolated-pawn penalty gives reproducible feedback after pawn advance bonus produced repeated negative signals.

blocks.name: pawn_structure.doubled_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for doubled-pawn penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether doubled-pawn penalty gives reproducible feedback after isolated-pawn penalty showed no measurable gradient.

blocks.name: king_safety
blocks.description: King exposure and shelter weights.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether king-safety features need dedicated shelter and attack-ring positions to produce stable static-eval gradients.

blocks.name: king_safety.attacked_ring_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for attacked king-ring penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether attacked king-ring penalty gives reproducible feedback after pawn-structure single-parameter faces stalled.

blocks.name: king_safety.attacked_king_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for attacked king penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether attacked-king penalty gives reproducible feedback after shield bonus parameters produced repeated negative p8 signals.

blocks.name: king_safety.pawn_shield_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for king pawn-shield bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether pawn-shield bonus gives reproducible feedback after attacked-ring penalty reached the lower bound.

blocks.name: king_safety.piece_shield_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter static-eval calibration block for king piece-shield bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether piece-shield bonus gives reproducible feedback after pawn-shield bonus produced repeated negative inner signal.

blocks.name: search.depth_time
blocks.description: Main search depth and timing controls.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether depth and quiescence controls improve forcing lines and endgame precision under line-quality feedback.

blocks.name: search.history_order
blocks.description: Formal online block for TT move ordering with mature feedback gating.
blocks.research_goal: Formal online tuning is restricted to TT move bonus because it is the only parameter in this family with repeatable discrete gate-cross evidence under the current feedback stack.

blocks.name: move_ordering.tactical
blocks.description: Tactical ordering rewards for captures, checks, promotions, and castling.
blocks.research_goal: Retest the full tactical ordering surface under stable oracle fallback before deciding whether to stop tactical tuning.

blocks.name: move_ordering.development
blocks.description: Development and centralization ordering bonuses.
blocks.research_goal: Determine whether opening development bonuses need dedicated opening-choice signals instead of generic line-quality samples.

blocks.name: move_ordering.promotion_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter tactical calibration block for promotion ordering.
blocks.research_goal: Validate whether reducing promotion ordering bonus is a reproducible positive signal under fixed internal-oracle prescreen calibration.

blocks.name: move_ordering.early_rook_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter development-ordering calibration for early rook movement penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether early rook movement penalty alone produces a stable line-quality signal after the broader development block failed to move.

blocks.name: move_ordering.minor_development_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter development-ordering calibration for minor piece development bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether minor piece development bonus alone produces a stable opening line-quality signal after early rook penalty showed no movement.

blocks.name: move_ordering.center_pawn_development_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter development-ordering calibration for central pawn development bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether central pawn development bonus alone produces a stable opening line-quality signal after minor development bonus was promoted.

blocks.name: move_ordering.early_queen_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter development-ordering calibration for early queen movement penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether early queen movement penalty alone produces a stable opening line-quality signal after center pawn development bonus showed no movement.

blocks.name: move_ordering.castling_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter ordering calibration for castling bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether castling bonus alone produces a stable line-quality signal after development-ordering penalties showed no movement.

blocks.name: move_ordering.center_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter development-ordering calibration for center move bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether center move ordering bonus alone produces a stable line-quality signal after castling bonus showed no movement.

blocks.name: move_ordering.extended_center_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter development-ordering calibration for extended center move bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether extended center move ordering bonus alone produces a stable line-quality signal after center bonus showed a repeated negative candidate.

blocks.name: move_ordering.check_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter tactical-ordering calibration for checking move bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether checking move ordering bonus alone produces a stable line-quality signal after extended center bonus failed post-promotion self-play.

blocks.name: move_ordering.capture_base_bonus
blocks.description: Single-parameter tactical-ordering calibration for capture base bonus.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether capture base ordering bonus alone produces a stable line-quality signal after promotion bonus showed no movement.

blocks.name: move_ordering.capture_victim_multiplier
blocks.description: Single-parameter tactical-ordering calibration for capture victim multiplier.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether capture victim multiplier produces a stable line-quality signal after capture base bonus showed no movement.

blocks.name: move_ordering.capture_attacker_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter tactical-ordering calibration for capture attacker penalty.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether capture attacker penalty produces a stable line-quality signal after capture victim multiplier showed no movement.

blocks.name: search.mate_threshold
blocks.description: Mate stopping and mate-score recognition thresholds.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether root mate stop distance and mate-detection margin have a coupled line-quality signal after both individual faces stalled.

blocks.name: search.quiescence_depth
blocks.description: Single-parameter quiescence search depth calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether quiescence depth alone produces a stable line-quality signal after the broad depth-time block failed to create discrete candidates.

blocks.name: search.min_time_margin_ms
blocks.description: Single-parameter minimum search time margin calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether the internal engine's minimum time margin alone produces a stable line-quality signal after quiescence depth showed no movement.

blocks.name: search.default_depth
blocks.description: Single-parameter default search depth calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether default search depth alone produces a stable line-quality signal after timing-margin tuning froze on a negative direction.

blocks.name: search.max_depth
blocks.description: Single-parameter maximum search depth calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether maximum search depth alone produces a stable line-quality signal after default depth showed no movement.

blocks.name: search.root_mate_stop_distance
blocks.description: Single-parameter root mate stop distance calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether root mate stop distance alone produces a stable self-play and search-behavior signal.

blocks.name: search.history_bonus_scale
blocks.description: Single-parameter history heuristic scale calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether history bonus scale alone produces a stable search-behavior signal without reopening the full history-order block.

blocks.name: search.history_bonus_power
blocks.description: Single-parameter history heuristic depth exponent calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether history bonus power alone produces a stable search-behavior signal after history bonus scale showed no effective movement.

blocks.name: search.mate_detection_margin
blocks.description: Single-parameter mate-score recognition margin calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether mate detection margin can produce a reproducible search-quality signal after move-ordering and depth-time surfaces stalled.

blocks.name: eval.constants
blocks.description: Boundary constants for draw, mate, and king-loss handling.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether the broad draw, mate, and missing-king constants block has any coupled static-eval signal after the individual faces stalled.

blocks.name: eval.draw_score
blocks.description: Single-parameter draw terminal score calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether the draw terminal score alone produces a stable self-play and static-eval signal.

blocks.name: eval.missing_king_penalty
blocks.description: Single-parameter missing-king penalty calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether missing-king penalty alone produces a stable self-play and static-eval signal.

blocks.name: eval.mate_score
blocks.description: Single-parameter mate score calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether mate score alone produces a stable self-play and static-eval signal.

blocks.name: piece_values
blocks.description: Base piece values, tuned later because they couple strongly with material weight.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether piece-value changes produce consistent static-eval direction on exchange, imbalance, and endgame material cases.

blocks.name: piece_values.pawn
blocks.description: Single-parameter pawn piece-value calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether pawn value alone produces a stable static-eval signal after other piece-value subfaces were held.

blocks.name: piece_values.knight
blocks.description: Single-parameter knight piece-value calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether knight value alone produces a stable static-eval signal before reopening broad piece-value tuning.

blocks.name: piece_values.bishop
blocks.description: Single-parameter bishop piece-value calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether bishop value alone produces a stable static-eval signal before reopening broad piece-value tuning.

blocks.name: piece_values.rook
blocks.description: Single-parameter rook piece-value calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether rook value alone produces a stable static-eval signal before reopening broad piece-value tuning.

blocks.name: piece_values.queen
blocks.description: Single-parameter queen piece-value calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether queen value alone produces a stable static-eval signal before reopening broad piece-value tuning.

blocks.name: phase
blocks.description: Phase thresholds shared by development bonuses and external-engine routing.
blocks.research_goal: Determine whether opening/endgame thresholds can be studied with dedicated boundary positions rather than generic evaluation samples.

blocks.name: phase.opening_fullmove_limit
blocks.description: Single-parameter opening phase cutoff calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether the opening fullmove cutoff alone produces a stable self-play and static-eval signal.

blocks.name: phase.endgame_non_king_piece_threshold
blocks.description: Single-parameter endgame phase cutoff calibration.
blocks.research_goal: Test whether the non-king-piece endgame threshold alone produces a stable self-play and static-eval signal.

blocks.name: external_engine.switch
blocks.description: A/B switch for enabling or disabling the black_numba backend.

blocks.name: external_engine.thresholds
blocks.description: Thresholds controlling when the external engine is allowed to run.

blocks.name: external_engine.budgets
blocks.description: Depth and node limits by phase for the external engine.
